sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρχαῖος

- Transliteration: Archaios

- Phonetic: ar-khah'-yos

- Definition:

1. that has been from the beginning, original, primal, old ancient

a. of men, things, times, conditions

- Origin: from G746

- TDNT entry: 09:06,8

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G746; original or primeval: - (them of) old (time).
